\multicolumn{9}{p{0.92\linewidth}}{\footnotesize Worsened station-days: $|$bias$_{\mathrm{DE}}| > |$bias$_{\mathrm{B11}}|$ against the AK-harmonized reference (median $\Delta|$bias$| = +0.28$\,ppm). Category: near-zero start = initial $|$bias$| \le 0.3$\,ppm (below the sign-flip floor of the within-overpass scatter); overshoot = the correction crosses zero; amplified = the residual grows with unchanged sign. The per-footprint RMSE still improves in 25 of 29 of these cases ($\Delta$RMSE $<0$), consistent with a common-mode residual rather than a per-footprint mis-correction (Sect.~4.4).}\\
\endlastfoot
